matches.title: Smart Production 2035: AI, IoT, and Quantum Computing in European Manufacturing
matches.abstract: This paper investigates the current and future role of innovative technologies in production management within European industrial companies. Rooted in the historical evolution of industrial revolutions, the study focuses on the ongoing transformation known as Industry 4.0, characterized by the integration of digital technologies such as IoT, big data, AI, and emerging concepts like quantum comput
